name: Methodist Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Betty Herrick
1. Heat the mixture of 1 cup Karo syrup and 1 cup sugar to near boiling point, but do not boil.
2. Add and blend in 1-1/2 cups peanut butter.
3. Add 5 cups Special K cereal and spread evenly in a 9x13 inch pan that has been greased with butter.
4. Melt together the chocolate chips and butterscotch chips.
5. Pour the melted mixture over the cereal mixture.
6. Allow the topping to set completely.
7. Cut into small squares when ready to serve.
